title: ETA for app columns?
excerpt:
Hey, 
I know it’s on your roadmap for apps, is there an ETA on this? Need to decide how to implement something and if this is coming, that would be best. 
Thanks, 
Ronen

posts.author: rbabayoff (Ronen Babayoff @ Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

I know it’s on your roadmap for apps, is there an ETA on this? Need to decide how to implement something and if this is coming, that would be best.

Thanks,
Ronen

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rbabayoff - we don’t quite have an ETA on this yet, but it is something on our roadmap that we’re hoping to have news on soon. We’ll be posting on here once we have more news.

-Daniel
